title: 10 best herbal tinctures for muscle pain
description: Frankincense tinctures helps with muscle pain because they contain boswellic acids, which have potent anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. When applied topically or taken internally, these acids work to reduce inflammation in the muscles, joints, and tendons, alleviating pain and stiffness associated with conditions like arthritis, fibromyalgia, and sciatica. Additionally, frankincense's ability to increase blood flow to affected areas helps promote healing and relaxation, furth...
